source_pr.title: expression: fix week func format
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fix the problem that the variable `default_week_format` doesn't work. 

fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/9669

### What is changed and how it works?

Use the SystemVar `DefaultWeekFormat` to invoke the `Week` function.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

evidence: files: expression/builtin_time.go, expression/builtin_time_test.go, expression/errors.go, go.sum, tools/check/go.sum, types/time.go
